{{Quote|The new mining colony on Goluud Minor desperately needs these components and equipment.|Ssk Kahorr|<ref name="TotJ" />}}
'''Goluud Minor''' was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located within the [[Goluud Minor system/Legends|Goluud Minor system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]. By [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]], a new [[Unidentified mining colony (Goluud Minor)|mining colony]] had been established on the planet, and [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Lord/Legends|lord]] [[Ssk Kahorr]] sent the [[Cha'a drone ship|drone ship]] ''[[Zeta Five]]'' to deliver much-needed mining technology and equipment to the colony and sell them to the wealthiest miners. However, the ''Zeta Five'' never arrived at Goluud Minor, as it was destroyed by a solar flare from the unstable [[Red supergiant/Legends|red supergiant]] [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]] during a stopover in the [[Primus Goluud system]].

==Description==
Goluud Minor was a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="TotJ" /> that was located within the [[Goluud Minor system/Legends|Goluud Minor system]] of the [[Arrowhead]], a region in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
{{Quote|My drone ship should be arriving at the mining world now… selling components to the wealthiest excavators so they can get a jump on the competition…|Ssk Kahorr|<ref name="TotJ" />}}
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="date">According to the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], the ''[[Zeta Five]]'' was sent to Goluud Minor shortly before the [[Daragon family|Daragon]] siblings' [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] jump to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]], which ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' dates to [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]].</ref> a new [[Unidentified mining colony (Goluud Minor)|mining colony]] had been established on Goluud Minor,<ref name="TotJ" /> and the [[Cha'a]] [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] [[Lord/Legends|lord]] [[Ssk Kahorr]] of the planet [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]] had become one of the colony's major investors.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|192|Kahorr, Ssk}}</ref> In that year, the excavators on Goluud Minor were in need of mining technology components and equipment, so Kahorr sent his [[Cha'a drone ship]], the ''[[Zeta Five]]'', to deliver the supplies to the colony and sell them to the wealthiest of the competitive miners.<ref name="TotJ" />

However, the Cha'a merchant chose to send the ''Zeta Five'' along the [[Goluud Corridor]],<ref name="TotJ" /> a recently discovered [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]]<ref name="route">{{CSWECite|I|352|Goluud Corridor}}</ref> that involved a [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]]-recalibration stop in the [[Primus Goluud system]]. Upon arriving in that [[Star system/Legends|system]], the drone [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was destroyed by an unexpected solar flare originating from the unstable [[Red supergiant/Legends|red supergiant]] [[Star/Legends|star]] of [[Primus Goluud/Legends|Primus Goluud]], and the vessel never arrived at Goluud Minor as a result.<ref name="TotJ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Goluud Minor was created for the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series and was mentioned in the [[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|first issue]] of [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith|''The Golden Age of the Sith'']] story arc.<ref name="TotJ" /> The issue was published on [[October 1]], [[1996]], and was written by [[Kevin J. Anderson]] and penciled by [[Dario Carrasco, Jr.]]<ref name="Dark Horse">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/95-267/Star-Wars-Tales-of-the-Jedi---The-Golden-Age-of-the-Sith-1-of-5|text=Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi—The Golden Age of the Sith #1 (of 5)}}</ref> The Goluud Minor system, and therefore Goluud Minor, was placed in grid square L-10 by ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', a [[2009]] reference book co-authored by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Daniel Wallace]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Golden Age of the Sith'' 1]] {{1stm}}
